positive: A symmetrical, highly detailed celestial botanical pattern featuring stylized glowing crescent moons, intricate geometric mandalas, and glowing exotic jungle flora. The composition is central and repeating, designed as a full-bleed patch print. Use a limited, high-contrast palette of deep indigo, ethereal gold, emerald green, and matte cream. The style should be a fusion of neo-art nouveau and psychedelic linework, rendered with crisp, clean silhouettes and sharp edges, making it perfect for apparel printing. Dramatic, ethereal rim lighting emphasizes the depth of the plants and the glow of the moons. Highly decorative, repeating, seamless tile pattern.
negative: blurry, messy, low detail, cropped, signature, text, watermark, logo, trademark, writing, artifacts, grain, poorly rendered, bad anatomy, extra limbs, disfigured, noise, abstract, photorealistic, grayscale, monochrome
